title: . Government employees. The terms and conditions of employment of all government employees,
content:
. Government employees. The terms and conditions of employment of all government employees, 
including employees of government-owned and controlled corporations, shall be governed by the Civil Service 
Law, rules and regulations. Their salaries shall be standardized by the National Assembly as provided for in 
the New Constitution. However, there shall be no reduction of existing wages, benefits and other terms and 
conditions of employment being enjoyed by them at the time of the adoption of this Code.
